records.title: Sleep cool all night with a pillow made for hot sleepers
records.description: The SKYNY Cooling Side Sleeper Pillow draws heat away so you can stop waking up overheated. Designed for side sleepers, with a cooling surface that works through the night.

records.title: Still waking up sweaty? Your pillow might be the problem
records.description: Most pillows trap heat — the SKYNY Cooling Side Sleeper Pillow doesn't. Cooling design helps you stop overheating at night, with proper side-sleeper support too.

records.title: Cooling pillow for side sleepers who overheat at night
records.description: Designed for side sleepers, the SKYNY Cooling Pillow helps hot sleepers stop overheating at night. The supportive shape and cool surface make for more settled, restful nights.

records.title: Wake up less with a pillow built for undisturbed sleep
records.description: Light sleepers need the right setup. The SKYNY Cooling Side Sleeper Pillow supports proper alignment and keeps you cool — two fewer reasons to wake in the night.

records.title: Light sleeper? The wrong pillow could be waking you up
records.description: Discomfort is one of the most common reasons light sleepers wake in the night. SKYNY's cooling side sleeper pillow reduces heat and keeps your neck properly supported.

records.title: Stop waking at 3am: side sleeper pillow for light sleepers
records.description: The SKYNY Cooling Side Sleeper Pillow gives light sleepers the support and cool surface they need to stay asleep. Better sleep starts with the right foundation.

records.title: Pillow designed for side sleepers who toss and turn at night
records.description: Restless sleepers need consistent support through the night. The SKYNY Cooling Side Sleeper Pillow provides the right firmness and a cool surface to help you settle.

records.title: Restless sleeper? Your pillow might be making it worse
records.description: If you shift around all night, poor pillow support could be why. SKYNY's cooling side sleeper pillow gives you the right firmness and cooling comfort to stay settled.

records.title: Can't get comfortable at night? A side sleeper pillow helps
records.description: Restless nights often come down to poor sleep setup. The SKYNY Cooling Side Sleeper Pillow is shaped for side sleepers and keeps temperature down through the night.
